title: Hallmark Christmas Bottle Bag Pack of 3, Traditional Red Tartan Design
features: CHRISTMAS GIFT BAG: This red tartan pack of Christmas bottle bags from Hallmark is large enough to hold a variety of surprises and presents. They're perfect for those bottled gifts that are difficult to wrap, and will look amazing under the tree!

CHRISTMAS GIFT BAGS PACK: This pack of 3 Hallmark bottle bags is the perfect way to celebrate Christmas. Each bag features a traditional tartan design, gold foil design details, red grosgrain ribbon handles and gold-foiled, tartan patterned gift tags.
HIGH-QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: This product is made using material from well-managed, FSC-certified forests and other controlled sources.
RECYCLABILITY: To recycle these bags, remove the handles and tags and recycle with card and paper materials, ensure non-paper material is disposed of separately.

GIFT BAG SIZE: These bottle bags measure H32.7cm by W13.3cm by D8.2cm, these gift bags the perfect size for all of your gifts. The generous size of each bag ensures that your gifts will fit snugly inside, while the sturdy handles make it easy to carry.
description: From the manufacturer From eye-catching tree-toppers to iconic character ornaments, adorable plush gifts and more, we've got everything you need to help you celebrate your way and bring a little extra joy to your world this Christmas. Our promise, to help inspire our customers to live caring, connected lives full of meaningful moments, is something that we take very seriously here at Hallmark. Since 1910, when JC Hall started our company with nothing but two shoeboxes full of picture postcards, we’ve been doing our best to help people celebrate all the special people and special days in their lives. No matter who you’re celebrating or lifting up, Hallmark has the perfect card to help you connect with the ones you love.
